areas.name: Roof
observations: Multiple missing shingles on south-facing slope
Visible algae growth and discoloration
Flashing around chimney shows signs of corrosion
Estimated roof age: 15 years
issues: Missing shingles create potential water intrusion paths
Flashing deterioration may allow water penetration

areas.name: Walls and Exterior
observations: Several bricks showing mortar deterioration on west wall
Cracked caulking around window frames
Paint peeling on wooden trim, particularly on north side
Foundation showing minor hairline cracks
issues: Water may enter through cracked caulking
Exposed wood on trim leads to rot potential

areas.name: HVAC System
observations: Air conditioning unit installed 2008 - approximately 18 years old
Furnace appears to be original, estimated age 35+ years
Some ductwork insulation damaged in attic
No recent maintenance records available
issues: Furnace age indicates potential safety concerns

areas.name: Plumbing
observations: Water heater is 22 years old - original to property
Some galvanized pipes visible in basement (likely original)
Minor water stains around water heater base
Water pressure adequate at all tested fixtures
issues: Water heater at end of expected lifespan
Galvanized pipes prone to corrosion and mineral buildup

areas.name: Electrical System
observations: Main panel is 100-amp service - outdated for modern home
Some aluminum wiring visible in older sections
Ground wire appears properly grounded
Several outlets without proper grounding in older sections
No GFCI outlets in bathrooms or kitchen
issues: Aluminum wiring has known fire risk concerns

areas.name: Attic
observations: Insulation depth approximately 4 inches - below current standards (R-38 to R-60 recommended)
Evidence of past water infiltration on rafters
Soffit vents partially blocked
No vapor barrier present
Minor roof leaks evident from interior staining
issues: Water damage evidence suggests past or ongoing leaks
Ventilation issues may cause moisture problems

general_observations: Property is 39 years old and shows typical age-related wear. Several systems are at or beyond recommended replacement age. Multiple maintenance issues indicate deferred maintenance pattern.
safety_concerns: Furnace age and condition warrant immediate professional evaluation
Electrical system safety issues per current code
Roof integrity compromised - water infiltration risk

images.description: Water staining on rafters from past leaks
